overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City. The camera follows pedestrians through a futuristic urban environment featuring yellow overpasses, dense neon-lit downtown areas, and the transition into Corpo Plaza, showcasing the game's high-fidelity cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: character in white outfit walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a busy street with orange barriers

notable_agents.action: futuristic green car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright yellow elevated walkway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall reflective glass building with multiple levels visible in the distance
large electronic advertisement screen mounted on building facade
yellow-orange metal railings separating pedestrian walkway from vehicle lanes
tall metallic pole with lighting fixtures and traffic signs attached

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit futuristic city street with a prominent yellow pedestrian overpass ahead. The camera follows a character in white clothing walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange traffic barriers. Futuristic vehicles drive along the adjacent road while tall glass skyscrapers and digital billboards rise in the background.

events.description: camera switches to following a different pedestrian character wearing a pink sleeveless top and red scarf
character crosses the street at a scramble crosswalk as traffic waits at the intersection

agents.ego_description: character in pink top with red scarf running then walking across the downtown intersection

notable_agents.action: teal futuristic car waiting at the traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with yellow striped lines marking the intersection
tall commercial towers with glass facades and corporate signage
bright electronic signs and holographic displays covering building surfaces
tall pole with multiple traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to follow a new character in a pink top as they move through a sunlit downtown intersection. The environment shifts from the covered street to an open crosswalk surrounded by towering corporate buildings covered in neon advertisements. The character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk city center with heavy digital advertising

agents.ego_description: character walking through crowded city center sidewalk passing other pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: character in white outfit walking ahead in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: giant digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade
futuristic street seating with illuminated edges along the sidewalk
teal and orange public transportation information terminal

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a crowded city center sidewalk lined with public benches and transit kiosks. Massive holographic billboards and neon advertisements cover the surrounding buildings, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere. The street is filled with pedestrians walking in the same direction while futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: Corpo Plaza entrance with open pedestrian spaces

events.description: entering Corpo Plaza area with more open space and modern plaza architecture

agents.ego_description: character crossing the final street and entering the open plaza area with modern architecture

entered.detail: modern plaza buildings with clean architectural lines and glass surfaces
transparent covered bridge connecting buildings above street level
tall vertical information display with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character crossing into Corpo Plaza, transitioning from the dense city center to a more open plaza environment. The area features modern architectural structures, glass elevated walkways, and digital directory signs. The crowd thins out as the character moves into this corporate district with cleaner, more spacious pedestrian areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic metropolis that gradually transitions from a bustling street into the sterile expanse of a corporate plaza. It begins by following a character in white along a concrete sidewalk bordered by orange barriers, moving toward a prominent yellow pedestrian overpass beneath towering glass skyscrapers. As the camera shifts to follow a character in a pink top, the scene opens into a wide downtown intersection where neon advertisements begin to dominate the surrounding corporate architecture. The movement then flows into a dense city center crowded with pedestrians and transit kiosks, where massive holographic billboards intensify the cyberpunk atmosphere. Finally, the environment expands as the character crosses into Corpo Plaza, shifting from the congested street into a spacious district defined by clean architectural structures and glass elevated walkways.
